productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Terra Sports Syn Grey Sandals
description: Designed with a sporty look, these adidas Terra sports sandals are absolutely comfortable and stylish. Offering breathable comfort at its best and ergonomically designed, these sandals are all that your feet need on those casual days away from work. Upper Adjustable synthetic forefoot and midfoot strap, with an ankle strap that has a padding for durability and to lock the foot in place Inner textile lining of the straps for comfort and to prevent blistering Midsole EVA footbed with ergonomically placed nubs for all-day massaged comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with diamond flex grooves on the forefoot and heel, and waffle pattern lugs in the toe and back heel region for absolute grip and traction on various surfaces Circular suction points strategically placed on the lateral side better stability Traxion technology employed in the outsole for absolute stability shoe care Wipe dust with a damp, clean cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
